title: themeda triandra var. vulgaris
intro: Themeda triandra var. vulgaris, also known as Kangaroo Grass or Blue Grass, is a variety of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Themeda triandra var. vulgaris include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as having antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. Themeda triandra var. vulgaris is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal benefits, and is also used in traditional remedies for various health issues.
